summary: Completed frontend testing of Input Type dropdown feature for Input layer. All 10 requested features tested and working correctly. Input Type dropdown shows 3 options (Flat, Image, Sequence), each showing appropriate configuration fields. All templates (MLP, CNN, RNN, Transformer) load with correct inputType and shape. View Code generates correct example inputs based on input type.
passed_tests: Test 1: CNN template loads with Input layer showing 'Type: Image' and 'Shape: [1, 28, 28]' on the node card
Test 2: Clicking Input layer shows dropdown with 3 options: Flat (Vector), Image (C, H, W), Sequence (Len, Feat)
Test 3: Selecting 'Flat (Vector)' shows 'Input Size' field in properties panel
Test 4: Selecting 'Image (C, H, W)' shows 'Channels', 'Height', 'Width' fields
Test 5: Selecting 'Sequence (Len, Feat)' shows 'Sequence Length', 'Features' fields
Test 6: Simple MLP template shows Flat input type with shape [784]
Test 7: RNN (LSTM) template shows Sequence input type with shape [50, 100]
Test 8: Transformer template shows Sequence input type with shape [32, 256]
Test 9: View Code for CNN generates correct example input: torch.randn(1, 1, 28, 28)
Test 10: View Code for RNN generates correct example input: torch.randn(1, 50, 100)
critical_code_review_comments: layerConfigs.js correctly defines inputTypes array with 3 options and getConfigFields function handles dynamic fields based on inputType
LayerNode.jsx formatInputShape and getDisplayConfig functions properly format input shape for display on node cards
codeGenerator.js correctly handles inputType for generating appropriate example inputs in PyTorch code
LayerPalette.jsx templates have correct inputType configurations for each template type
context_for_next_testing_agent: Input Type dropdown feature for Input layer is fully functional. All templates load with correct inputType (flat/image/sequence) and display appropriate shape on node cards. Properties panel shows dynamic fields based on selected inputType. Code generation produces correct example inputs for each input type.
